credentialRequirements.name: HOSTING_DEPLOY_TOKEN
credentialRequirements.description: Static hosting provider deploy token (Netlify, Cloudflare Pages, etc.)

credentialRequirements.name: LEAD_WEBHOOK_URL
credentialRequirements.description: Webhook endpoint URL for lead capture form submissions

approvalGate.blockedReason: Live static hosting deployment requires HOSTING_DEPLOY_TOKEN and LEAD_WEBHOOK_URL. No credentials supplied in proof pass.
requiredUserActions: Supply LEAD_WEBHOOK_URL for lead capture integration

secretPolicyChecks.description: No .env files with real credential values committed to source
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No committed .env files with real credential values detected for marketing_website

secretPolicyChecks.description: Environment variable manifest (.env.example or app.config.json) is present
All required credentials declare mustNotBeCommitted=true for secrets
secretPolicyChecks.detail: mustNotBeCommitted=true is declared for all secret-class credentials in the credential manifest.

secretPolicyChecks.description: No hardcoded secret patterns (API keys, JWT tokens, AWS keys) found in source files
secretPolicyChecks.detail: No hardcoded secret patterns detected in marketing_website source files

caveat: This manifest declares credential requirements for approved credentialed deployment. No credentials are stored, validated, or used in this proof pass. Live deployment is blocked by default and requires explicit user approval and user-supplied credentials.
